name: id
description: Postgres UUID primary key of the outbox record.

name: event_id
description: Unique UUID of the outbox audit event.

name: event_type
description: Type of event (e.g. CARD_FROZEN, APPLICATION_CREATED, USER_CREATED).

name: payload
description: Strongly typed native JSON structured event payload containing domain attributes.

name: created_at
description: Event creation timestamp for daily partitioning and CDC watermark ordering.
